expectations.evidence: Line 17: 'Nutritional status: Underweight — BMI 17.6 kg/m² (<18.5); MUAC 21.5 cm (<23 cm borderline). High nutritional risk requiring targeted intervention.'

expectations.text: Enhanced nutritional supplementation or counseling recommended
expectations.evidence: Lines 47-50: 'Balanced energy and protein supplementation recommended — WHO-recommended in undernourished populations.' Includes dietary counseling to diversify diet, referral to food supplementation program, and close weight gain monitoring.

expectations.text: Tetanus toxoid vaccination schedule initiated (TT1 with schedule for TT2+)
expectations.evidence: Line 57: 'Tetanus toxoid: TT1 given at this visit — No vaccination card available; vaccination history unknown. Assume 0 prior doses. Schedule TT2 at least 4 weeks from today (at next available contact).'

expectations.text: Psychosocial support or adolescent-friendly services mentioned
expectations.evidence: Lines 64-68: 'Refer to adolescent-friendly mental health/psychosocial support services' with supportive counseling, community support groups for adolescent mothers, and school continuation support. Also line 23: 'Adolescent-friendly service approach required.'
Line 16: 'Anemia status: Mild anemia — Hb 10.5 g/dL' and line 41: 'Iron: 120 mg elemental iron daily (therapeutic dose) — Mild anemia (Hb 10.5 g/dL) in a high-prevalence setting (≥40%).'
